title: Shadow's Formidable Foes: The HeadHunter
description: Adds a challenging endgame boss: The HeadHunter
body:
"You are gonna get slapped, kicked and shot at, and you are gonna love it" ~ Steve

Have you felt that modded minecraft is too easy with all your overpowered gear and cheesy tactics?
Well this boss is here to spice things up and add a little more fun to your playthrough :)
The HeadHunter is a vessel for the great scourge Akrasena, and is sent to claim the heads of powerful creatures to bolster Akrasena's strength. The HeadHunter uses weapons specialised for hunting prey at close and long distances. The Widowmaker: A pistol that never misses. Carnage: A greatsword  that is capable of creating massive aftershocks when used, and some say that his demonic potential has yet to be released. 

Based on intel collected from observations of the HeadHunter's past appearances, The Formless Guide will provide you with all the necessary information to prepare for a fight against the HeadHunter. This guide is crafted using 6 paper and one book for the basic version, or 7 paper and one book for the advanced version. All information can also be found in your advancements page so remember to check it. 

If you somehow manage to defeat The HeadHunter, Akrasena will sacrifice a portion of it's strength to deny the HeadHunter of his eternal rest and instead revive him to continue the hunt once more. However each time this happens the HeadHunter drops a portion of Akrasena's power in the form of a Bloodied Diamond. You can use this to give your weapon a unique and powerful enchantment. Do note too that the HeadHunter can also appear in much more powerful variants, having 4 difficulties to give you a true challenge, note though that these are purely optional challenges. 


This mod has to be used with geckolib, download link is here: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/geckolib

Thanks to DarkMega for helping me test out the mod, doing on my own puts a huge strain on my sanity. Do check out wardance, a cool combat mod that focuses on intricate battle mechanics! (Maximum neuron activation) https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/project-war-dance

For 1.19.2
Music: Lost ark game sound tracks, CC-by
